headline: Is Anthropic's Claude Mythos an AI nightmare waiting to happen?
summary: Anthropic (ANTH.PVT) is claiming that its new Claude Mythos AI model may be too powerful and is limiting its release after it reportedly “found thousands of high-severity vulnerabilities, including some in every major operating system and web browser," and could be used to hack software. Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley outlines how Claude Mythos may be one of the AI landscape's biggest fears.

headline: US software stocks fall as Anthropic's new AI model revives disruption fears
summary: U.S. software shares tumbled on Thursday after Anthropic held back the wide release of a powerful AI ‌model over concerns it could expose hidden cybersecurity vulnerabilities, deepening ‌investor fears about the threat to traditional software firms.  Anthropic said earlier this week it ​would only allow a group of around 40 companies, including Microsoft and Google, access to its "Claude Mythos" model because it has already found thousands of vulnerabilities, including some in every major operating system and web browser.  "If ‌Mythos is that strong ⁠and that powerful and it's exposing these vulnerabilities that have been around for years, it just shows one, ⁠the weakness of the current software that's out there and two, that AI is still making incredible progress versus legacy software companies," said Michael O’Rourke, ​chief ​market strategist at JonesTrading.

raw.headline: US software stocks fall as Anthropic's new AI model revives disruption fears
raw.summary: U.S. software shares tumbled on Thursday after Anthropic held back the wide release of a powerful AI ‌model over concerns it could expose hidden cybersecurity vulnerabilities, deepening ‌investor fears about the threat to traditional software firms.  Anthropic said earlier this week it ​would only allow a group of around 40 companies, including Microsoft and Google, access to its "Claude Mythos" model because it has already found thousands of vulnerabilities, including some in every major operating system and web browser.  "If ‌Mythos is that strong ⁠and that powerful and it's exposing these vulnerabilities that have been around for years, it just shows one, ⁠the weakness of the current software that's out there and two, that AI is still making incredible progress versus legacy software companies," said Michael O’Rourke, ​chief ​market strategist at JonesTrading.

The initiative aims to use advanced AI models to identify and patch software vulnerabilities and share learnings across sectors. For you as an investor, Project Glasswing puts NYSE:JPM alongside leading technology companies in a shared effort to protect critical systems from AI...

headline: Josh Bersin Company's Irresistible 2026 HR Leadership Conference Announces Compelling Speaker Line-Up and Learning Agenda
summary: The Josh Bersin Company, the world's leading HR advisory firm, today announced the final confirmed line-up and agenda for its milestone fifth Irresistible annual conference. Taking place on June 8-10 at, and hosted in partnership with, USC Marshall School of Executive Education in Los Angeles, the three-day event is designed to help HR leaders develop a clear, practical understanding of what is possible in the world of AI in business, while offering valuable time with Josh Bersin Company analyst
